Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are going to create two POWL models based on the description First lets break down the steps from the description Steps 1 Receive application resume and questionnaire 2 Resume parsing and initial data check with a loop for missing information 3 Preliminary skill assessment with a threshold but well model the pass fail as a choice 4 Cultural fit and community affiliation check with potential bias in the first model and without in the second 5 Managerial review and final decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are to model two versions Model 1 with potential unfairness After the skill assessment there is an XOR branching One branch is a standard cultural fit evaluation and the other is a CommunityAffiliationCheck that gives an advantage This XOR is based on whether the applicant has a certain affiliation or is a local resident Model 2 without unfairness All applicants go through the same cultural fit evaluation No special branch

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We note that the description also includes a loop for data completeness step 1 Well model that as a loop where we check the data and then either request more info or proceed

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets define the activities we might use ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment StandardCulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: We also note that in the description the skill assessment has a threshold We can model this as an XOR after the SkillAssessment either the applicant passes and proceeds or fails and is rejected

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Since the problem is about the bias in the cultural fit we can simplify by assuming that the skill assessment passes and then we proceed or fails and then the process ends

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Well structure the process as 1 ReceiveApplication 2 Then a loop for data completeness DataCompletenessCheck if incomplete RequestMoreInfo and then loop back else exit loop 3 Then SkillAssessment 4 Then an XOR for the skill assessment result If pass proceed to the next step cultural fit check which in the unfair model is an XOR between two checks and in the fair model is just one check If fail reject 5 Then in the unfair model we have an XOR between StandardCulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck 6 Then ManagerialReview and FinalDecision

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: However note that the unfair model has an XOR for the cultural fit check So we can have For the pass branch of the skill assessment we have an XOR between Option1 StandardCulturalFitCheck Option2 CommunityAffiliationCheck And then both options lead to ManagerialReview and then FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This model represents Start with ReceiveApplication then the loop for data completeness then SkillAssessment then the XOR for skill result If fail then silent transition and the process ends If pass then we have the pass branch which is a partial order first the XOR for cultural fit either standard or community then ManagerialReview then FinalDecision This matches the unfair model

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now the fair model We remove the XOR for the cultural fit and have only the StandardCulturalFitCheck for everyone So we change the pass branch to have only the StandardCulturalFitCheck activity and then ManagerialReview and FinalDecision
